overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a hooded character walking along a stone mountain path through a misty, overcast forest landscape. The journey progresses from an enclosed wooded trail to an open cliffside with valley views, encountering wildlife, and culminating at a large waterfall.

scene_state.functional_zone: forested mountain trail with stacked stone walls

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the stone path through the enclosed forested area with high stone walls on both sides

entered.detail: stacked rock wall running along the left side of the path
stacked rock wall running along the right side of the path
tall evergreen trees towering over the path
large rocky mountain slope visible through the trees

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow cobblestone path enclosed by high stone walls and dense evergreen forest. The atmosphere is misty and overcast with limited sky visibility through the tree canopy.

scene_state.functional_zone: open cliffside path with expansive valley overlook

events.description: exits enclosed forest path onto open cliffside revealing expansive misty valley below

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path as the landscape opens up to reveal the misty valley and distant mountains

entered.detail: steep rocky cliff face rising on the left side of the path
rocky cliff face dropping off to the right overlooking the valley
expansive view of misty valley with distant mountains and fog

segments.scene_description: The path opens onto a wide cliffside with panoramic views of a mist-filled valley below. The stone walls give way to natural rock faces as the character walks along the exposed trail under the overcast sky.

events.description: a deer appears standing on the path ahead, then moves aside as the character approaches

agents.ego_description: walking toward a deer standing on the path, then passing it as the waterfall becomes visible in the distance

notable_agents.action: deer standing on the path, then moving off to the left side as the character approaches and passes

entered.detail: wild deer standing on the cobblestone path
large waterfall visible in the distant canyon ahead

segments.scene_description: While walking along the cliffside path, the character encounters a deer standing on the trail. As the character passes the deer, a large waterfall becomes visible in the distance at the end of the canyon.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky canyon approach to large waterfall

events.description: waterfall grows significantly larger in the frame as the character approaches the canyon end

agents.ego_description: walking toward the large waterfall at the end of the canyon, with the roar of water becoming imminent

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrower canyon section with the waterfall growing ever larger ahead. The rocky cliffs close in on both sides as the path leads directly toward the cascading water at the canyon's end.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an enclosed, misty forest trail that gradually opens into a vast cliffside vista before culminating at a towering waterfall. It begins with the character walking along a narrow cobblestone path hemmed in by high stone walls and a dense evergreen canopy under an overcast sky. As the path expands, the stone walls give way to natural rock faces, revealing a panoramic view of a mist-filled valley below. The scene then shifts as the character encounters a deer on the exposed trail, just as a distant waterfall emerges at the far end of the canyon. Finally, the environment closes in again as the character enters a narrow rocky gorge, with the cascading water growing larger and more dominant as the path leads directly toward it.
